query:
SELECT discoveryStatus, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN send_ready > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN send_ready = 0 AND total_contacts > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_contacts_no_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total_contacts = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts_at_all
FROM (
  SELECT p.discoveryStatus,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
  FROM projects p
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0
) sub
GROUP BY discoveryStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT discoveryStatus, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN send_ready > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN send_ready = 0 AND total_contacts > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_contacts_no_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total_contacts = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts_at_all
FROM (
  SELECT p.discoveryStatus,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
  FROM projects p
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0
) sub
GROUP BY discoveryStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
